prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校物理类招生专业中计 算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，临床医学、人工智能等专业也保持较高关注度，相关专业热度对报考有一定拉动作用；湖南省2026年物理 类考生约347,000人，较2025年320,192人增加约8.4%，考生规模扩大，竞争加剧；延边大学位于吉林省延边州，距湖南省 较远，跨省就读的地域偏好可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划小 幅扩招（+4.9%）、湖南省物理类考生规模增长（+8.4%）以及学校软科排名持续提升等因素，在2025年基准44253名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次数字小幅上移；预测最低位次 约45609名，区间45109–46109名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 37425 → 32288 → 41536 → 44998 → 44253, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, it reached the highest ranking in recent years at 44998, then slightly recovered to 44253 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 12,000 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 44253. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 52 → 2022: 47 → 2023: 47 → 2024: 53 → 2025: 61 → 2026: 64. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 3 students (+4.9%), with two consecutive years of expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been continuously rising, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has steadily improved, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. Yanbian University has not appeared in recent reputation evaluations or abnormal admission files, with no obvious negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (rated as average), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, and relatively stable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors enrolled in the Physics Category at this university, majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (hot/highly recommended). Clinical Medicine, Artificial Intelligence, and other majors also maintain high attention. The popularity of related majors has a certain pulling effect on applications. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025. The expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, which is relatively far from Hunan Province. The regional preference for cross-province study may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4.9%), the growth of Hunan Province's Physics Category examinee pool (+8.4%), and the continuous improvement of the university's Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 44253, with the ranking number moving slightly upward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 45609, with a range of 45109–46109.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 45609, range 45109–46109. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 majors for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 45109), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, and Electronic Information Engineering. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net and carefully choose Tier 1 majors.
